DescribeCacheNodeBccCandidates.filters: Filter conditions (see Appendix Filter). Multiple filters are combined with AND logic; multiple values within a filter use OR logic. Supported fields: * name=bccId, filter by BCC ID, e.g. value=["i-RC35eAcH", "i-5si77yc4"]; * name=bccName, filter by BCC name, e.g. value=["name1", "name2"]; * name=bccIp, filter by BCC IP, e.g. value=["192.168.0.1", "192.168.0.2"]; * name=tag, batch filter by BCC bound tags, e.g. value=["tagkey:tagvalue", "tagkey"]
DescribeCacheNodeBccCandidates.filters.name: Field to filter on; multiple filters are combined with AND logic. E.g. zone
DescribeCacheNodeBccCandidates.filters.values: Filter values for the field; multiple values use OR logic. E.g. ["zoneA", "zoneB"]
DescribeCacheNodeBccCandidates.maxKeys: Maximum number of entries to return. Valid range: [1, 1000]. Default: 100
DescribeCacheNodeBccCandidates.marker: Starting position for paginated list retrieval. Use the nextMarker value returned from the previous response
